t-tertiary svelte-1sr1rc0\"><h5 class=\"text-center t-primary\">This page needs JavaScript to function.</h5> <br/> Your request has been flagged as being suspicious and Brave Search decided to schedule a captcha for\n    you. Unfortunately, <strong>your browser does not seem to have JavaScript enabled.</strong> <br/> <br/> Here are a few things you can do: <ul><li>If you are using the <strong>Brave Browser</strong> with scripts blocked, you can enable scripts\n        again for Brave Search then reload this page.</li> <li>If you are using the <strong>Tor browser</strong> with its <a href=\"https://tb-manual.torproject.org/security-settings/#safest\" rel=\"noopener\"><strong>safest</strong></a> security level, you can selectively enable JavaScript on Brave Search via the noscript extension\n        toggle then reload this page.</li> <li>If the above does not match your situation, make sure that your browser supports JavaScript\n        and that no extension is currently disabling JavaScript on Brave Search.</li></ul></div></noscript><!--]--><!--]--><!--]--> <!--[-1--><!--]--> <!--[-1--><!--]--><!----></div><!--]--><!--]--> <!--[-1--><!--]--><!--]-->\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t<script nonce=\"PSi4DnxCjwk2RJxLRfxVWA==\">\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t__sveltekit_1c0s6wj = {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbase: new URL(\".\", location).pathname.slice(0, -1),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tassets: \"https://cdn.search.brave.com/serp/v3\"\n\t\t\t\t\t};\n\n\t\t\t\t\tconst element = document.currentScript.parentElement;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tPromise.all([\n\t\t\t\t\t\timport(\"https://cdn.search.brave.com/serp/v3/_app/immutable/entry/start.mQOfoc2D.js\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\timport(\"https://cdn.search.brave.com/serp/v3/_app/immutable/entry/app.DiYmjU6v.js\")\n\t\t\t\t\t]).then(([kit, app]) => {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tkit.start(app, element, {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnode_ids: [0, 2, 11],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdata: [{type:\"data\",data:{userAgent:{uaString:\"Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh;
